hero.subtitle: AI solutions for healthcare decision-making
hero.now: Now: test automation at GE Healthcare R&D · Automation & Robotics at Aalto University

stats.label: Study pace while working two jobs

items.title: AI Decision Support Systems
items.text: RAG assistants and anomaly detection that clinicians can trace, audit and trust.

items.title: Test Automation & Quality
items.text: Production-grade automated testing for medical device R&D. Quality that holds up in regulated environments.

items.title: Teaching & Explaining Complex Things
items.text: Teaching assistant at Aalto: probability and statistics, classical physics, and electricity and magnetism. I make hard concepts land.

cards.title: THL Health Data ETL
cards.text: Full pipeline on five years of real primary care visits from THL's Avohilmo API: PostgreSQL staging and analytics layers, Metabase dashboards, and Llama 3.1 anomaly detection that automatically flagged the COVID-era code collapse from 114k visits to 3k.

cards.title: Waveform Lag Analyzer
cards.text: Built at GE Healthcare to prove a regulatory requirement: waveforms on patient monitors must render with no lag visible to the human eye. OpenCV splits the video feed into per-graph bands and scans each one column by column with center-of-mass and relative-level analysis. Now used in R&D verification.

cards.title: Semantic Defect Search
cards.text: Hybrid search over a decade of defect reports at GE Healthcare, answering one question: have we seen this before? Dense, BM25 and ColBERT retrieval fused with Reciprocal Rank Fusion and a cross-encoder reranker, with log-line normalization that pushed retrieval accuracy into the mid-90s. Every design choice was measured against a recall@k evaluation harness. Runs on-prem in Docker and is queried from a shared CLI or straight from AI coding assistants over MCP.

cards.title: GE Healthcare Test Automation
cards.text: Performance and reliability testing for patient monitoring software in R&D. I write and refactor the automated Python and Robot Framework suites behind accelerated clinical stress and reboot testing, and present performance metrics to the principal engineer to support technical decisions.

cards.title: Healthcare RAG Assistant
cards.text: Source-traceable answers from 14 Käypä hoito clinical guidelines. Every response cites document and page, with a full audit log designed for EU AI Act compliance.

items.title: THL Health Data ETL
items.text: A live Metabase dashboard built on five years of real Finnish primary-care data: visit trends, ICD-10 breakdowns, and the AI-flagged anomalies my pipeline detects.

items.title: Healthcare RAG Assistant
items.text: Ask a clinical question and get an answer grounded in Kaypa hoito care guidelines, with the source document and page cited for every claim.
